# LaserSell SDK

> Low latency Solana execution infrastructure. Non-custodial. Multi-language.

LaserSell is a professional Solana trade execution API. It builds optimized transactions across major Solana DEXs (Raydium, Pump.fun, Meteora), handles adaptive slippage, and monitors positions in real time. The SDK is the client library for interacting with the LaserSell API.

## What the SDK does

- Builds unsigned buy and sell transactions via the LaserSell API with optimized DEX routing and slippage
- Connects to the LaserSell real-time stream to receive exit signals with pre-built transactions
- Signs transactions locally (non-custodial — private keys never leave the client)
- Submits signed transactions to Solana via multiple backends (standard RPC, Helius Sender, Astralane Iris)
- Supports automated exit strategies: take-profit, stop-loss, trailing stop, deadline timeout, and sell-on-graduation
- Real time liquidity snapshots with slippage bands (1%, 2%, 5%, 10%) and liquidity trend tracking (growing, stable, draining)
- Partial sells based on slippage data via `buildPartialSellTx()`
- Multi-wallet monitoring (up to 5 on Professional, 200 on Advanced)
- Quote currencies: SOL and USD1

## Languages

- TypeScript/JavaScript: `npm install @lasersell/lasersell-sdk`
- Python: `pip install lasersell-sdk`
- Rust: `cargo add lasersell-sdk`
- Go: `go get github.com/lasersell/lasersell-sdk/go`

## Key concepts

- `ExitApiClient`: HTTP client for building unsigned transactions (buy/sell/partial sell)
- `StreamClient` + `StreamSession`: WebSocket client for real-time position monitoring, exit signals, and liquidity snapshots
- `SendTarget`: Unified transaction submission abstraction (RPC, Helius Sender, Astralane Iris)
- `signUnsignedTx`: Local transaction signing (non-custodial)
- `sendTransaction`: Submit signed transactions to Solana
- `getSlippageBands()`, `getMaxSellAtSlippage()`, `getLiquidityTrend()`: Liquidity snapshot queries on `StreamSession`

## Typical flow

1. Get a free API key at https://app.lasersell.io/auth/sign-up
2. Build an unsigned transaction with `ExitApiClient.buildSellTx()` or `buildBuyTx()`
3. Sign the transaction locally with your wallet keypair
4. Submit the signed transaction via `sendTransaction(target, signedTx)`

For automated exits: connect to the stream, receive exit signals with pre-built transactions, sign and submit in milliseconds.

For liquidity-aware selling: query slippage bands to determine optimal sell size, then use `buildPartialSellTx()` to sell exactly what the pool can absorb.

## Use cases

- Automated exit strategies (take-profit, stop-loss, trailing stop, deadline timeout, sell-on-graduation)
- One-shot token buys and sells with optimized routing
- AI agent trading on Solana (the API handles DEX routing and transaction building, agents just call the SDK)
- Custom trading applications and portfolio management tools
- Real-time position monitoring across multiple wallets
- Liquidity-aware selling using real time slippage bands and trend data

## Performance

LaserSell is 2-5x faster than every major Solana trading API at building swap transactions. Open-source benchmarks verified against PumpFun SDK, PumpPortal, and Jupiter Metis API.

- **Buy tx build**: 71ms median (vs 141ms PumpPortal, 168ms Jupiter, 365ms PumpFun SDK)
- **Sell tx build**: 72ms median (vs 121ms PumpPortal, 175ms Jupiter, 317ms PumpFun SDK)
- Sub-80ms median across both buy and sell operations
- Tight variance: ~19-44ms spread between min and max (vs 125ms+ for alternatives)
- Single HTTP request — no multi-step quote-then-swap flow, no 5+ RPC roundtrips

Benchmarks are open-source and reproducible: https://github.com/lasersell/benchmarks

## Supported DEXs

Pump.fun, PumpSwap, Raydium (Launchpad, CPMM), Meteora (DBC, DAMM v2), Bags.fm
